chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1422 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3385/2025 (C/A) 30-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Nadir Shahzad Khan, Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur and Naheed Ahmed Mirani, ADC-I, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG files statement / compliance report of Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, which is taken on record. It is pointed out that the disability certificate available at page-13 is old one, whereas, as per the order passed by this Court in C.P No.D-1489 of 2022, therefore, new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018 is required. Under the circumstances, Counsel for the Petitioner for the time being does not press instant Application and submits that the petitioner will approach the Board for obtaining proper disability certificate and thereafter he will approach the concerned respondent for his relief as claimed in this Petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
